# SARKSH GROW

SARKSH GROW is a Hyderabad-based FinTech company and financial institution in build phase, focused on market awareness, demat account education, trading learning, product pathways, and responsible financial technology for Indian market learners and Indian families.

Public website: https://www.sarksh.in/
LinkedIn: https://in.linkedin.com/company/sarksh-grow
Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/sarksh_grow
Google Business Profile: https://share.google/mHoFcuE6nHLWqcx05

Current public activity: free market awareness and education. Regulated product services will begin only after required approvals and compliance readiness. SARKSH GROW does not guarantee returns.
